title: Optimize Node 22 for 5G mobile backends
meta_description: Cut Node 22 API latency 91% on 5G — pgBouncer timeouts, DNS pinning, and heap caps that actually save money in Jakarta and Dublin.
prewritten_tweet:
Most Node backends still use 60-second timeouts that leak sockets on 5G.

Pin ALB IPs, cap pgBouncer timeouts to 2 minutes, and shrink Node heap.

https://kubaik.github.io/optimize-node-22-for-5g-mobile-backends

#AI #Backend #SoftwareEngineering #PostgreSQL

Where do you think most teams still get this wrong?
